title: PWG Russian final translated card with QA verdict

key.description: Workflow batch key; when present it must match card.key1.

grammar.description: POS/gender as PWG, verbatim where applicable.

renou_oldest_sense.description: Index into senses[] of the sense whose oldest <ls> citation is earliest in this record (the meaning attested first). Omitted when no sense carries a dated citation. Added by annotate_renou.py.

german.description: The PWG German for this sense, with the source's {#…#} Sanskrit delimiters and <ls>/<ab>/<lex>/<is> markup kept VERBATIM — not stripped to plain text, not transliterated to bare IAST.

russian.description: The Russian rendering in scholarly register.

stratum.description: Stratum used, such as Vedic, Epic / early-Classical, Classical, Medieval, or empty.

differentia.description: Apresjan near-synonym discrimination note, or empty when no discrimination was needed.

cases.description: Government case(s), copied VERBATIM from the source <ab>case.</ab> token(s) — never invented.

variation.description: True when this marker lists more than one case (e.g. 'loc. und gen.').

connector.description: 'und' / 'oder' when variation is true, else empty.

span.description: The exact source snippet the marker was read from, e.g. '(<ab>loc.</ab> und <ab>gen.</ab>)'.

government.description: OPTIONAL. Structured case-government (Rektion) marker(s) for this sense — the case(s) frame the word takes, one entry per parenthesized <ab>case.</ab> group or 'mit'-phrase found in the source German (a sense may carry more than one, e.g. two clauses each governing a different case). D4 ruling (08-07-2026): structured object, not a free string — copy the case abbreviation verbatim from the source; NEVER invent, guess, or generalize one. Empty array when the sense governs nothing. Deterministically extractable via RussianTranslation/src/government_census.py:extract_government(german). Grounds: apparatus study Dimension 1 / H335 W3.

labels.description: OPTIONAL. Diasystem / domain labels in the Kochergina Russian abbreviation set (e.g. грам., миф., бот., мед., астр., филос., юр., воен., поэт., nom. pr.). Maps PWG <ab>/AP90 bracketed domain markers onto Koch's vocabulary. Chronology is NOT carried here — that is the separate Renou stratum/renou fields. Empty/absent when no domain applies. Grounds: apparatus study Dimension 2.

renou.description: Renou language-state(s) of Sanskrit this sense is attested in, derived deterministically from its <ls> citations (I Vedic, II Pāṇinian, III Epic, IV Classical, V Buddhist/Jaina). Multi-label, ordered I→V. Empty/absent when the sense carries no recognised quotation. Added by annotate_renou.py.

renou_oldest.description: The Renou state of this sense's earliest-dated <ls> citation, or empty when no dated citation is present.

evidence.description: OPTIONAL. Per-sense evidence provenance from the corpus_gate lanes (H335 W2 / H337). Each entry records a Russian-glossing authority that PROVIDES or SUPPORTS this sense's Russian gloss. Lemma-level standing (silent/contradicts, and the non-Russian corroboration lanes) lives in the card's evidence_summary. Deterministic, LLM-free; the supports/provides split is a token-overlap heuristic. Added by annotate_evidence.py; also written per-row on the flat store.

source.description: Evidence lane source code. leonov is RESERVED (Sundarakāṇḍa apparatus, not yet machine-usable) — never emitted, only reserved so the enum is stable.

relation.description: provides = source states this sense's exact Russian equivalent; supports = token containment with the sense ru at/above corpus_gate.THRESHOLD; contradicts/silent are lemma-level and appear in evidence_summary, not in a sense's evidence[].

gloss_ref.description: The matched source gloss / synonym / passage snippet.

match.description: Whether the lane joined on the lemma key or its bare stem (the Hindi SENSE / botanical lanes index on both).

evidence_summary.description: OPTIONAL. Lemma-level (per key1) evidence roll-up (D1, DECISIONS_PIPELINE_CAPABILITY_H335.md): recorded once per lemma — on the structured card, and identically on every flat store row sharing the key1 (the flat store has no lemma object). Added by annotate_evidence.py.

silent.description: Source codes absent for this lemma, or present but carrying no usable Russian meaning gloss (e.g. a Smirnov citation-list, Kossovich bare transliteration) — an uninformative silence, deliberately NOT a contradicts.

contradicts.description: Russian-glossing sources that have a usable gloss for the lemma but overlap NO sense of it (a heuristic disagreement candidate).

present.description: Non-Russian corroboration lanes present for the lemma (apte_hi/vedic_rituals_hi/kosha_syn/meulenbeld/corpus) — presence signal only, never a correctness verdict.

supports_senses.description: Russian source codes that provided/supported >=1 sense of the lemma (their per-sense detail is in each sense's evidence[]).

evidence_status.description: corpus_gate.evidence_status() at annotation time: 'ok' when >=1 INDEP authority was loaded, else 'evidence_unavailable' (so a false 'silent' from missing sources is distinguishable).

corpus_status.description: corpus_gate corpus_examples_with_status() status: ok / db_absent / db_error / skipped_short_term.

stats.description: OPTIONAL. Derived, self-invalidating per-lemma counts (GRAMMAR_LAYER.md § 'Counting grammar', H422; expanded H777). Cached from fields already on the card so government_census.py / government_queries.py-style aggregation is not re-run on every question. Added by annotate_stats.py, run last in the annotator chain; attached identically to every flat store row sharing key1 (the flat store has no lemma object), mirroring evidence_summary. Finer-grained sibling blocks `record_stats` (per homonym group) and `sense_stats` (per row) carry the same families at their own grain — see annotate_stats.py.

n_records.description: Distinct homonym groups (records) for this lemma.

n_senses.description: Total sense count across all records of this lemma.

cases_governed.description: Union of cases governed across this lemma's senses.

has_variation.description: True when >=1 government marker lists more than one case.

n_layers.description: Distinct source layers of the 5-layer merge (pwg/pw/sch/pwkvn/nws) contributing senses to this lemma.

layers_present.description: Which merge layers contributed a sense (sorted).

n_senses_supplement.description: Senses from a non-PWG supplement layer (layer != 'pwg'); PWG is the grammatical backbone.

n_ls.description: Total <ls> citation markers across this lemma's German source (attestation density).

n_lex.description: Total <lex> POS/gender markers across the German source.

n_ab.description: Total <ab> grammatical-abbreviation markers across the German source.

n_xref.description: Cross-reference markers (deterministic floor: 'vgl.'/vergleiche only; 's.'/siehe omitted as ambiguous).

n_labels.description: Total Kochergina-style domain labels (грам./миф./бот. …) across senses.

equivalence_types.description: Distribution of `equivalence_type` across this lemma's senses (equivalent/explanatory/…).

n_null.description: Senses with an empty Russian translation (untranslated).

dcs_freq_max.description: DCS corpus attestation for this lemma's most-attested matched form (exact-iast join against dcs_freq.json by_lemma). null when no sense's form exact-matches DCS.

grammar_join.description: whitney_grammar join status: 'single' = one Whitney homonym, fully joined; 'ambiguous-homonym' = >1 homonym, PWG-h↔Whitney alignment owed (counts null, not guessed); 'none' = not a Whitney root.

n_whitney_homonyms.description: Number of Whitney homonym records for this SLP1 root (0 = not a Whitney root).

stem_final.description: Final SLP1 phoneme of key1 (coarse stem hint; correct-by-construction, not a declension-class claim).

n_irregularities.description: Whitney-grammar exception count for this lemma (irregularities[] length). Populated when grammar_join=='single'; null when 'ambiguous-homonym' (alignment owed) or 'none' (not a Whitney root). H777 joined the grammar block — no longer stuck at 0.

strata_span.description: [oldest, youngest] Renou-style era found in this lemma's free-text `stratum` fields, in STRATA_ORDER (Vedic..Medieval). Empty when no sense carries a recognised stratum label.

n_strata.description: Distinct recognised era labels found across this lemma's senses.

evidence.description: Sense-level provides/supports counts (from each sense's evidence[]) plus lemma-level contradicts/silent counts (source-code counts from evidence_summary).

pipeline_version.description: pipeline_version.py manifest 'script' component version at compute time. A stats block stamped below the current script version is stale -> recompute (annotate_stats.is_stale).

sigla_kept.description: Source sigla and grammar abbreviations remain verbatim.
